Deprecated API

Contents

  • Classes
  • Fields
  • Methods
  • Constructors
  • Enum Constants
  • Deprecated Classes
    Class
    Description
    sc.fiji.snt.analysis.PeripathDetector
    Use PeripathDetector instead. This class is retained for backward compatibility and delegates all calls to the new package.
    sc.fiji.snt.analysis.PeripathDetector.Config
    Use PeripathDetector.Config instead.
    sc.fiji.snt.analysis.PeripathDetector.Detection
    Use Detection instead.
    sc.fiji.snt.analysis.TreeAnalyzer
    Use TreeStatistics instead
    sc.fiji.snt.gui.EnhancedGenericDialog
    sc.fiji.snt.plugin.AnalyzerCmd
    replaced by MeasureUI
  • Deprecated Fields
    Field
    Description
    sc.fiji.snt.analysis.MultiTreeStatistics.MEAN_RADIUS
    use #PATH_MEAN_RADIUS instead
    sc.fiji.snt.analysis.TreeStatistics.AVG_SPINE_DENSITY
    Use TreeStatistics.PATH_SPINE_DENSITY instead
    sc.fiji.snt.analysis.TreeStatistics.CONTRACTION
    Use TreeStatistics.BRANCH_CONTRACTION or TreeStatistics.PATH_CONTRACTION instead
    sc.fiji.snt.analysis.TreeStatistics.FRACTAL_DIMENSION
    Use TreeStatistics.BRANCH_FRACTAL_DIMENSION or TreeStatistics.PATH_FRACTAL_DIMENSION instead
    sc.fiji.snt.analysis.TreeStatistics.MEAN_RADIUS
    Use TreeStatistics.BRANCH_MEAN_RADIUS or TreeStatistics.PATH_MEAN_RADIUS instead
    sc.fiji.snt.Path.noMoreThanOneEvery
    Use Path.DEFAULT_SAMPLING_INTERVAL instead
    sc.fiji.snt.Path.SWC_END_POINT
    sc.fiji.snt.Path.SWC_FORK_POINT
  • Deprecated Methods
    Method
    Description
    sc.fiji.snt.analysis.graph.GraphUtils.createGraph(Collection<SWCPoint>, boolean)
    sc.fiji.snt.analysis.graph.GraphUtils.createGraph(Tree)
    sc.fiji.snt.analysis.graph.GraphUtils.createTree(Graph<SWCPoint, ?>)
    sc.fiji.snt.analysis.graph.GraphUtils.getSimplifiedGraph(DirectedWeightedGraph)
    sc.fiji.snt.analysis.PeripathDetector.createTorusMask(Collection<Path>, ImagePlus, PeripathDetector.Config, double)
    Use PeripathDetector.createTorusMask(java.util.Collection<sc.fiji.snt.Path>, net.imglib2.RandomAccessibleInterval<T>, sc.fiji.snt.analysis.detection.PeripathDetector.Config, double) instead.
    sc.fiji.snt.analysis.PeripathDetector.createTorusMask(Collection<Path>, RandomAccessibleInterval<T>, PeripathDetector.Config, double)
    Use PeripathDetector.createTorusMask(java.util.Collection<sc.fiji.snt.Path>, net.imglib2.RandomAccessibleInterval<T>, sc.fiji.snt.analysis.detection.PeripathDetector.Config, double) instead.
    sc.fiji.snt.analysis.PeripathDetector.detect(Collection<Path>, RandomAccessibleInterval<? extends RealType<?>>, PeripathDetector.Config)
    Use PeripathDetector.detect(java.util.Collection<sc.fiji.snt.Path>, net.imglib2.RandomAccessibleInterval<? extends net.imglib2.type.numeric.RealType<?>>, sc.fiji.snt.analysis.detection.PeripathDetector.Config) instead.
    sc.fiji.snt.analysis.SNTChart.setVisible(boolean)
    sc.fiji.snt.analysis.TreeStatistics.getMetrics()
    sc.fiji.snt.gui.EnhancedGenericDialog.menuItemTriggeringResources()
    sc.fiji.snt.hyperpanes.MultiDThreePanesCanvas.setCrosshairs(double, double, double, boolean)
    sc.fiji.snt.Path.addAsLinesTo3DViewer(Image3DUniverse, Color, ImagePlus)
    sc.fiji.snt.Path.addAsLinesTo3DViewer(Image3DUniverse, Color3f, ImagePlus)
    sc.fiji.snt.Path.addDiscsTo3DViewer(Image3DUniverse, Color, ImagePlus)
    sc.fiji.snt.Path.addDiscsTo3DViewer(Image3DUniverse, Color3f, ImagePlus)
    sc.fiji.snt.Path.addTo3DViewer(Image3DUniverse, Color, ImagePlus)
    This method is deprecated. Use newer 3D visualization methods instead.
    sc.fiji.snt.Path.addTo3DViewer(Image3DUniverse, Color3f, ImagePlus)
    This method is deprecated. Use newer 3D visualization methods instead.
    sc.fiji.snt.Path.createCircles()
    No longer needed - radii and tangents are now stored per-node
    sc.fiji.snt.Path.getJunctionNodes()
    use Path.getBranchPoints() instead
    sc.fiji.snt.Path.getPoint3fList()
    sc.fiji.snt.Path.getStartJoins()
    use Path.getParentPath() instead
    sc.fiji.snt.Path.getStartJoinsPoint()
    Use Path.getBranchPoint() instead.

    NB: Earlier versions of Simple Neurite Tracer allowed paths to connect at either the start point (getStartJoinsPoint()) or end-point (getStartJoinsPoint()). Useful for some applications but a huge headache to handle.

    sc.fiji.snt.Path.interpolateMissingRadii(DoublePredicate, boolean)
    Use Path.sanitizeRadii(DoublePredicate, boolean) instead
    sc.fiji.snt.Path.removeFrom3DViewer(Image3DUniverse)
    This method is deprecated. Use newer 3D visualization methods instead.
    sc.fiji.snt.Path.setStartJoin(Path, PointInImage)
    use Path.setBranchFrom(Path, PointInImage) instead
    sc.fiji.snt.Path.unsetStartJoin()
    sc.fiji.snt.Path.versionInUse()
    Use Path.isActiveVersion() instead
    sc.fiji.snt.PathAndFillManager.canvasResized()
    sc.fiji.snt.PathAndFillManager.contentAdded(Content)
    sc.fiji.snt.PathAndFillManager.contentChanged(Content)
    sc.fiji.snt.PathAndFillManager.contentRemoved(Content)
    sc.fiji.snt.PathAndFillManager.contentSelected(Content)
    sc.fiji.snt.PathAndFillManager.universeClosed()
    sc.fiji.snt.plugin.StrahlerCmd.getTable()
    Use StrahlerCmd.getSummaryTable() instead
    sc.fiji.snt.SNT.get3DUniverse()
    sc.fiji.snt.SNT.getPaths3DDisplay()
    sc.fiji.snt.SNT.setColorImage(ImagePlus)
    sc.fiji.snt.SNT.setPaths3DDisplay(int)
    sc.fiji.snt.SNT.showCorrespondencesTo(File, Color, double)
    sc.fiji.snt.SNT.startHessian(String, double, double, boolean)
    sc.fiji.snt.SNT.updateImageContent(int)
    sc.fiji.snt.SNTPrefs.loadStartupPrefs()
    sc.fiji.snt.SNTPrefs.saveStartupPrefs()
    sc.fiji.snt.SNTService.demoTree()
    sc.fiji.snt.SNTService.demoTreeImage()
    sc.fiji.snt.SNTService.getAnalyzer(boolean)
    Use SNTService.getStatistics(boolean) instead
    sc.fiji.snt.SNTService.getPlugin()
    use SNTService.getInstance() instead
    sc.fiji.snt.SNTUtils.getPluginInstance()
    use SNTUtils.getInstance() instead
    sc.fiji.snt.tracing.auto.AbstractGWDTTracer.setMinSegmentLength(double)
    Use AbstractGWDTTracer.setMinBranchIntensityLength(double) instead. Note: the physical-to-voxel conversion is not meaningful for this parameter since it is an intensity sum, not a distance.
    sc.fiji.snt.tracing.auto.AbstractGWDTTracer.setMinSegmentLengthVoxels(double)
    Use AbstractGWDTTracer.setMinBranchIntensityLength(double) instead.
    sc.fiji.snt.Tree.assignUniqueColors(Collection<Tree>)
    use TreeUtils.assignUniqueColors(Collection)
    sc.fiji.snt.Tree.assignUniqueColors(Collection<Tree>, String)
    use TreeUtils.assignUniqueColors(Collection, String)
    sc.fiji.snt.Tree.downSample(double)
    Use Tree.downsample(double) instead.
    sc.fiji.snt.util.ImgUtils.imgPlusToCalibration(ImgPlus<?>)
    Use ImgUtils.getCalibration(ImgPlus) instead
    sc.fiji.snt.util.TreeToRaster.rasterizeLabels()
    Use TreeToRaster.rasterizePathLabels() instead
    sc.fiji.snt.viewer.MultiViewer2D.setLabel(String)
    sc.fiji.snt.viewer.OBJMesh.getLabel()
    use OBJMesh.label instead
    sc.fiji.snt.viewer.Viewer2D.addTree(Tree)
    Use Viewer2D.add(Object) instead
    sc.fiji.snt.viewer.Viewer2D.addTrees(Collection<Tree>)
    use Viewer2D.add(Object) instead
    sc.fiji.snt.viewer.Viewer2D.showPlot()
    Use Viewer2D.show() instead.
    sc.fiji.snt.viewer.Viewer3D.addTrees(Collection<Tree>, boolean)
    use Viewer3D.addTrees(Collection, String) instead
  • Deprecated Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    sc.fiji.snt.analysis.PathProfiler(Path, ImagePlus)
    Use PathProfiler(Path, Dataset)
    sc.fiji.snt.analysis.PathProfiler(Tree, ImagePlus)
    Use PathProfiler(Tree, Dataset)
    sc.fiji.snt.analysis.sholl.parsers.ImageParser(ImagePlus)
    sc.fiji.snt.analysis.TreeAnalyzer(Tree)
    Use TreeStatistics constructors instead
  • Deprecated Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    sc.fiji.snt.viewer.Viewer3D.ViewMode.SIDE
    Use YZ instead
    sc.fiji.snt.viewer.Viewer3D.ViewMode.TOP
    Use XY instead
